methods.name: DIFFCOT
methods.description: Diffusion-styled Chain-of-Thought framework that reformulates CoT reasoning as an iterative denoising process with sliding-window mechanism

methods.name: Step-level Forward Noising
methods.description: Forward noising process for CoT using reward-ranked candidates to inject noise into reasoning steps

methods.name: Reward-ranked Candidate Collection
methods.description: Collecting candidates by reward scores for the forward noising process

methods.name: Diffusion Sliding-Window Mechanism
methods.description: Sliding window applied to iteratively denoise past steps while generating new ones

methods.name: Causal Diffusion Noise
methods.description: Noise mechanism to strengthen causal consistency across reasoning steps

problems.name: Chain-of-Thought
problems.description: Step-by-step reasoning in LLMs for mathematical problem solving

problems.name: Error Accumulation in CoT
problems.description: Early mistakes propagating irreversibly through autoregressive decoding steps

problems.name: Exposure Bias in CoT
problems.description: Model trained only on correct prefixes but infers on potentially erroneous prefixes at test time
